pin_definitions.description: A capacitor from this pin to RTN sets output voltage slew rate.
Fault event indicator. It is an open drain output. If unused, leave floating.
A resistor from this pin to RTN sets the overload and short-circuit current limit.
Analog current monitor output. This pin sources a scaled down ratio of current through the internal FET.
Power input and supply voltage of the device
Mode selection pin for over load fault response.
Input for setting the programmable overvoltage protection threshold.
PowerPad must be connected to RTN plane on PCB using multiple vias for enhanced thermal performance.
Reference for device internal control circuits
Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.
Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold.

logical_pins.name: dVdT
logical_pins.description: A capacitor from this pin to RTN sets output voltage slew rate. Can be left floating for default rate.

logical_pins.name: FLT
logical_pins.description: Fault event indicator. It is an open drain output.

logical_pins.name: ILIM
logical_pins.description: A resistor from this pin to RTN sets the overload and short-circuit current limit

logical_pins.name: IMON
logical_pins.description: Analog current monitor output. This pin sources a scaled down ratio of current through the internal FET.
